rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.184, which governs inter-district contracts for career and technology classes. No statutory intersection exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may contract with another school district or with a public or private postsecondary educational institution or trade or technical school that is regulated by this state, as designated in the state plan for career and technology education required under Section 29.182, to provide career and technology classes for students in the district.
_note: No conflict identified. Educ. Code §29.184 addresses school district contracting authority for career and technology education and does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or Tax Code §11.13.
